style_effects: Gentle water droplets cling to Bulbasaur's bulb and skin, slowly rising like tiny bubbles before vanishing into the air. A soft, reflective blue light emanates from its pores, casting ripples of light across the surrounding water droplets. The aura glows with a cool, serene blue-white hue, shaped like a gentle, undulating wave around its body. Clean cel-shaded Pokémon illustration style with bold outlines and soft shading.
